Restaurant Tip Calculator

Quickly calculate the tip for your restaurant bill. Choose a tip percentage and split among your group.

FAQ

How much should I tip at a restaurant?

In the US, 15-20% is standard for sit-down restaurants. 20%+ for excellent service. 10-15% for buffets or counter service.

Should I tip on the pre-tax or post-tax amount?

Etiquette experts suggest tipping on the pre-tax amount, though tipping on the total is also common and appreciated.

How do I split the tip among a group?

Calculate the total bill plus tip, then divide by the number of people. This calculator does it automatically.
